You said: i wanna show advertisements in scrolling manner

i wanna show advertisements in scrolling manner

21 May

Claude responded: Here's a clean auto-scrolling banner carousel component for you: Here's the component code to drop into your project:

Here's a clean auto-scrolling banner carousel component for you:

V

Connecting to visualize...

Here's the component code to drop into your project:

jsx
import { useState, useEffect, useRef } from "react";

const banners = [
  { src: "/advertise_1.jpg", alt: "Advertisement 1" },
  { src: "/advertise_2.jpg", alt: "Advertisement 2" },
  { src: "/advertise_3.jpg", alt: "Advertisement 3" },
];

export default function Banners() {
  const [current, setCurrent] = useState(0);
  const timerRef = useRef(null);

  const goTo = (index) => {
    setCurrent((index + banners.length) % banners.length);
  };

  const startTimer = () => {
    timerRef.current = setInterval(() => {
      setCurrent((prev) => (prev + 1) % banners.length);
    }, 3000);
  };

  const stopTimer = () => clearInterval(timerRef.current);

  useEffect(() => {
    startTimer();
    return () => stopTimer();
  }, []);

  return (
    <div
      className="relative w-full overflow-hidden rounded-lg"
      onMouseEnter={stopTimer}
      onMouseLeave={startTimer}
    >
      {/* Track */}
      <div
        className="flex transition-transform duration-500 ease-in-out"
        style={{ transform: `translateX(-${current * 100}%)` }}
      >
        {banners.map((banner, i) => (
          <img
            key={i}
            src={banner.src}
            alt={banner.alt}
            className="min-w-full h-30 object-cover"
          />
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Prev / Next */}
      <button
        onClick={() => goTo(current - 1)}
        className="absolute left-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 bg-black/40 text-white w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-black/60"
        aria-label="Previous"
      >
        ‹
      </button>
      <button
        onClick={() => goTo(current + 1)}
        className="absolute right-2 top-1/2 -translate-y-1/2 bg-black/40 text-white w-8 h-8 rounded-full flex items-center justify-center hover:bg-black/60"
        aria-label="Next"
      >
        ›
      </button>

      {/* Dots */}
      <div className="absolute bottom-2 left-1/2 -translate-x-1/2 flex gap-1.5">
        {banners.map((_, i) => (
          <button
            key={i}
            onClick={() => goTo(i)}
            className={`w-2 h-2 rounded-full transition-all ${
              i === current ? "bg-white" : "bg-white/50"
            }`}
          />
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

A few things to note:

Adding more banners — just push objects into the banners array. The carousel adapts automatically.

Changing the interval — swap out 3000 in setInterval to whatever ms you want.

Hover-to-pause — the onMouseEnter/onMouseLeave on the wrapper stops and restarts the timer, so users can inspect an ad without it sliding away.

Infinite loop — the modulo trick (index + length) % length handles wrapping in both directions cleanly.

Claude responded: Here's the RoleSelector.

Viewed a file, created a file, read a file

Here's the RoleSelector.jsx component. It matches the design closely:

  • Left card — white bg, dark navy CTA button with arrow, orange check icons, ghost home icon top-right
  • Right card — dark navy bg, white CTA button with trend arrow icon, same check pattern, ghost trades icon top-right
  • Responsive grid — stacks to single column on mobile via auto-fit
  • Hover effects — cards lift slightly, buttons darken/shadow on hover
  • Uses DM Sans from Google Fonts (swap for whatever font your project uses)

If you want to wire up the buttons, just add onClick handlers to each <button>.

Claude responded: Got it, surgical changes only from now on.

Got it, surgical changes only from now on. Here are the ones to make the cards bigger:

That's all — no structural changes needed.

21 May

Claude responded: Here's the component — swap in your real image paths in the magazines array:

Here's the component — swap in your real image paths in the magazines array:

jsx
import { useState } from "react";
import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";

const magazines = Array.from({ length: 30 }, (_, i) => ({
  id: i + 1,
  src: `/magazine_${i + 1}.jpg`,
  alt: `Magazine Issue ${i + 1}`,
}));

export default function RecentMagazine() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
  const perPage = 5;
  const totalPages = Math.ceil(magazines.length / perPage);
  const visible = magazines.slice(page * perPage, page * perPage + perPage);

  return (
    <div style={{ padding: "32px 24px", fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif" }}>
      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", marginBottom: "24px" }}>
        <div>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: "22px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#1a1a1a", margin: "0 0 6px" }}>
            Recent Magazine
          </h2>
          <div style={{ width: "40px", height: "3px", background: "#e07b2a", borderRadius: "2px" }} />
        </div>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px" }}>
          {[{ dir: -1, icon: <ChevronLeft size={16} />, disabled: page === 0 },
            { dir: 1, icon: <ChevronRight size={16} />, disabled: page === totalPages - 1 }]
            .map(({ dir, icon, disabled }) => (
              <button
                key={dir}
                onClick={() => setPage((p) => p + dir)}
                disabled={disabled}
                style={{
                  width: "34px", height: "34px",
                  border: "1px solid #d1d5db",
                  borderRadius: "6px",
                  background: "#fff",
                  display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
                  cursor: disabled ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
                  opacity: disabled ? 0.4 : 1,
                  color: "#374151",
                }}
              >
                {icon}
              </button>
            ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Magazine Grid */}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(5, 1fr)", gap: "12px" }}>
        {visible.map((mag) => (
          <div
            key={mag.id}
            style={{
              borderRadius: "6px",
              overflow: "hidden",
              cursor: "pointer",
              transition: "transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease",
            }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => {
              e.currentTarget.style.transform = "translateY(-4px)";
              e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = "0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)";
            }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => {
              e.currentTarget.style.transform = "translateY(0)";
              e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = "none";
            }}
          >
            <img
              src={mag.src}
              alt={mag.alt}
              style={{ width: "100%", aspectRatio: "3/4", objectFit: "cover", display: "block" }}
            />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

Key points:

  • perPage = 5 shows 5 at a time, arrows page through all 30
  • Left arrow is disabled on page 0, right on the last page
  • Hover lifts cards with a shadow
  • Replace src: \/magazine_${i + 1}.jpg`with your actual image paths/URLs — or if fetching from an API, replace themagazines` array with your data
src: `/mag-${i + 1}.png` || `/mag-${i + 1}.jpg`,
21 May

Claude responded: That's not how || works with strings — both /mag-${i+1}.

That's not how || works with strings — both /mag-${i+1}.png and /mag-${i+1}.jpg are truthy strings, so it'll always pick the .png side regardless.

You have two options:

Option 1 — Just pick one extension (simplest, if all files are the same type):

js
src: `/mag-${i + 1}.png`,

Option 2 — Handle load error as fallback:

jsx
<img
  src={mag.src}
  alt={mag.alt}
  onError={(e) => { e.currentTarget.src = e.currentTarget.src.replace('.png', '.jpg'); }}
  style={{ width: "100%", aspectRatio: "3/4", objectFit: "cover", display: "block" }}
/>

This tries .png first, and if it fails to load, swaps to .jpg.

You said: not loading

not loading

21 May

Claude responded: The images aren't loading because the paths might be wrong.

The images aren't loading because the paths might be wrong. A few things to check:

1. Where are your images stored?

  • In public/ folder → use /mag-1.png ✅
  • In src/assets/ → you need to import them, plain paths won't work

2. Check the exact filenames — open your public/ folder and confirm:

  • Is it mag-1.png or mag_1.png or magazine-1.png?
  • Case sensitive on Linux servers — Mag-1.png ≠ mag-1.png

3. Quick debug — paste this in your browser console:

js
fetch('/mag-1.png').then(r => console.log(r.status))
  • 200 → path is correct, something else is wrong
  • 404 → wrong path

4. If images are in src/assets/, do this instead:

js
// At the top, import them individually
import mag1 from "./assets/mag-1.png";

// Or use dynamic import with Vite
const magazines = Array.from({ length: 30 }, (_, i) => ({
  id: i + 1,
  src: new URL(`./assets/mag-${i + 1}.png`, import.meta.url).href,
}));

Tell me where your images are located and I'll give you the exact fix.

You said: png are loading not jpg

png are loading not jpg

21 May

Claude responded: Simple fix — just change the extension to .

Simple fix — just change the extension to .png in the array:

js
src: `/mag-${i + 1}.png`,

That's it.

You said: already

already

21 May

Claude responded: Then you're good — if PNGs are loading, nothing else needs to change.

Then you're good — if PNGs are loading, nothing else needs to change. The || fallback was the only issue and it's resolved by using .png directly.

Claude responded: The middle card uses a white background with a dark icon to match the design — steps 1 and 3 use the orange bg with white icons.

jsx
import { FileEdit, ClipboardList, BadgeCheck } from "lucide-react";

const steps = [
  {
    icon: <FileEdit size={28} color="#fff" />,
    title: "1. Post your job",
    desc: "Describe your project and location. It only takes 60 seconds.",
    active: true,
  },
  {
    icon: <ClipboardList size={28} color="#1e293b" />,
    title: "2. Get 3 Quotes",
    desc: "Verified professionals in your area will review and provide competitive quotes.",
    active: false,
  },
  {
    icon: <BadgeCheck size={28} color="#fff" />,
    title: "3. Choose & Start",
    desc: "Review profiles and ratings, choose your pro, and get the job done right.",
    active: true,
  },
];

export default function HowItWorks() {
  return (
    <div style={{
      background: "#0f172a",
      padding: "80px 40px",
      textAlign: "center",
      fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
      position: "relative",
      overflow: "hidden",
    }}>
      {/* Background circle decoration */}
      <div style={{
        position: "absolute", top: "-80px", right: "-80px",
        width: "400px", height: "400px", borderRadius: "50%",
        background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.04)", pointerEvents: "none",
      }} />

      <h2 style={{ fontSize: "42px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#fff", margin: "0 0 16px" }}>
        How it Works
      </h2>
      <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#94a3b8", maxWidth: "480px", margin: "0 auto 64px", lineHeight: 1.7 }}>
        Our streamlined process ensures you get the best local talent without the stress of endless phone calls.
      </p>

      {/* Steps */}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(3, 1fr)", gap: "0", maxWidth: "860px", margin: "0 auto", position: "relative" }}>
        {/* Connector line */}
        <div style={{
          position: "absolute", top: "44px", left: "calc(16.66% + 40px)", right: "calc(16.66% + 40px)",
          height: "1px", background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.15)", zIndex: 0,
        }} />

        {steps.map((step, i) => (
          <div key={i} style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", alignItems: "center", gap: "20px", padding: "0 24px", position: "relative", zIndex: 1 }}>
            <div style={{
              width: "88px", height: "88px", borderRadius: "16px",
              background: step.active ? "#f97316" : "#fff",
              display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
              flexShrink: 0,
            }}>
              {step.icon}
            </div>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: "18px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#fff", margin: 0 }}>
              {step.title}
            </h3>
            <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", color: "#94a3b8", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: 0 }}>
              {step.desc}
            </p>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

The middle card uses a white background with a dark icon to match the design — steps 1 and 3 use the orange bg with white icons.

21 May

Claude responded: Replace /lead-1.

jsx
const leads = [
  { label: "New Lead: Bath Refurbishment",  src: "/lead-1.jpg", rotate: "-2deg", top: "0",    left: "0",    zIndex: 1 },
  { label: "New Lead: Garden Wall Repair",  src: "/lead-2.jpg", rotate: "2deg",  top: "-20px", left: "210px", zIndex: 2 },
  { label: "New Lead: Smart Home Install",  src: "/lead-3.jpg", rotate: "-1deg", top: "200px", left: "20px",  zIndex: 1 },
  { label: "New Lead: Loft Conversion",     src: "/lead-4.jpg", rotate: "1deg",  top: "190px", left: "220px", zIndex: 2 },
];

export default function GrowBusiness() {
  return (
    <div style={{
      background: "#e8ecf7",
      borderRadius: "24px",
      padding: "60px 56px",
      display: "flex",
      alignItems: "center",
      justifyContent: "space-between",
      gap: "40px",
      fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
      maxWidth: "1000px",
      margin: "0 auto",
    }}>

      {/* Left */}
      <div style={{ maxWidth: "360px", flexShrink: 0 }}>
        <h2 style={{ fontSize: "36px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", lineHeight: 1.25, margin: "0 0 16px" }}>
          Grow your business with Quotemyjob.
        </h2>
        <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: "0 0 32px" }}>
          Join 1000+ verified professionals and start receiving quality leads in your immediate area today.
        </p>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px", alignItems: "flex-start" }}>
          <button style={{
            background: "#f97316", color: "#fff", border: "none",
            borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
            fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer",
            fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>
            Join as a Tradesperson
          </button>
          <button style={{
            background: "#fff", color: "#0f172a", border: "none",
            borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
            fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer",
            fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>
            Success Stories
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right — lead cards */}
      <div style={{ position: "relative", width: "420px", height: "380px", flexShrink: 0 }}>
        {leads.map((lead, i) => (
          <div key={i} style={{
            position: "absolute",
            top: lead.top,
            left: lead.left,
            width: "185px",
            background: "#fff",
            borderRadius: "12px",
            overflow: "hidden",
            boxShadow: "0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)",
            transform: `rotate(${lead.rotate})`,
            zIndex: lead.zIndex,
          }}>
            <img src={lead.src} alt={lead.label} style={{ width: "100%", height: "130px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block" }} />
            <div style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
              <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#0f172a" }}>{lead.label}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

    </div>
  );
}

Replace /lead-1.jpg through /lead-4.jpg with your actual image paths. The slight rotation on each card matches the staggered collage layout from the design.

Claude responded: Only the sizing changes needed:

Only the sizing changes needed:

jsx
maxWidth: "1216px",
// padding and inner sizing scale up:
padding: "80px 80px",

// Left column
maxWidth: "440px",
fontSize: "42px", // h2

// Right panel
width: "560px",
height: "500px",

// Each card
width: "230px",

// Card image
height: "160px",

// Reposition cards to fill the bigger right panel
{ ...left: "0",    top: "0"    }  // card 1
{ ...left: "255px", top: "-20px" } // card 2
{ ...left: "20px",  top: "240px" } // card 3
{ ...left: "258px", top: "225px" } // card 4

21 May

Claude responded: Replace the logo <div> with your actual <img src="/logo.

jsx
const footerLinks = [
  {
    heading: "Marketplace",
    links: ["Browse Categories", "For Tradespeople", "Success Stories"],
  },
  {
    heading: "Resources",
    links: ["Safety & Trust", "Support Center", "Help Guides"],
  },
  {
    heading: "Company",
    links: ["Contact Info", "About Us", "Careers"],
  },
];

export default function Footer() {
  return (
    <footer style={{
      background: "#1e2a3b",
      fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
      color: "#cbd5e1",
    }}>
      {/* Main */}
      <div style={{
        maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto",
        padding: "56px 40px 48px",
        display: "grid",
        gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",
        gap: "40px",
      }}>

        {/* Brand */}
        <div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px", marginBottom: "16px" }}>
            {/* Logo placeholder — swap with your <img> */}
            <div style={{
              width: "40px", height: "40px", borderRadius: "50%",
              background: "#f97316", display: "flex", alignItems: "center",
              justifyContent: "center", fontSize: "18px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#fff",
            }}>Q</div>
            <div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#fff", lineHeight: 1 }}>QUOTE</div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#f97316", lineHeight: 1 }}>MYJOB</div>
              <div style={{ fontSize: "9px", color: "#94a3b8", letterSpacing: "2px" }}>CONNECT</div>
            </div>
          </div>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#94a3b8", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: 0, maxWidth: "200px" }}>
            Connecting the best trades with the best projects since 2024.
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Link columns */}
        {footerLinks.map((col) => (
          <div key={col.heading}>
            <h4 style={{ fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#fff", margin: "0 0 20px" }}>
              {col.heading}
            </h4>
            <ul style={{ listStyle: "none", margin: 0, padding: 0, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px" }}>
              {col.links.map((link) => (
                <li key={link}>
                  <a href="#" style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#94a3b8", textDecoration: "none" }}
                    onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#fff"}
                    onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#94a3b8"}
                  >{link}</a>
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Divider */}
      <div style={{ borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }} />

      {/* Bottom bar */}
      <div style={{
        maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto",
        padding: "20px 40px",
        display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between",
      }}>
        <span style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "#64748b" }}>
          © 2024 Quotemyjob. Built for professionals.
        </span>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "24px" }}>
          {["Privacy Policy", "Terms of Service", "Cookie Settings"].map((item) => (
            <a key={item} href="#" style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "#64748b", textDecoration: "none" }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#fff"}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#64748b"}
            >{item}</a>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );
}

Replace the logo <div> with your actual <img src="/logo.png" /> when ready.

21 May

Claude responded: Remove the size={10} — that's not a valid img prop.

jsx
<img src="/websiteLogoBgRem.png" style={{ width: "80px", height: "auto" }} />

Remove the size={10} — that's not a valid img prop. Adjust width up/down to taste.

You said: image boundary is in blue

image boundary is in blue

21 May

Claude responded: The image has a background.

The image has a background. Since it's a PNG, it likely doesn't have transparency. Two options:

Option 1 — if the PNG has a dark/transparent background already, just reduce size:

jsx
<img src="/websiteLogoBgRem.png" style={{ width: "120px", height: "auto" }} />

Option 2 — force blend with footer background (quick fix):

jsx
<img src="/websiteLogoBgRem.png" style={{ width: "120px", height: "auto", mixBlendMode: "screen" }} />

mixBlendMode: "screen" burns out the dark background so only the logo mark shows — works well on dark backgrounds.

You said: too small

too small

21 May

Claude responded: Keep increasing in 20px steps until it looks right.

jsx
<img src="/websiteLogoBgRem.png" style={{ width: "180px", height: "auto", mixBlendMode: "screen" }} />

Keep increasing in 20px steps until it looks right.

You said: make it responsive

const leads = [
  { label: "New Lead: Bath Refurbishment",  src: "/business-1.jpg", rotate: "3deg", top: "0",    left: "0",    zIndex: 1 },
  { label: "New Lead: Garden Wall Repair",  src: "/business-2.jpg", rotate: "-6deg",  top: "-20px", left: "255px", zIndex: 2 },
  { label: "New Lead: Smart Home Install",  src: "/business-3.jpg", rotate: "-2deg", top: "240px", left: "20px",  zIndex: 1 },
  { label: "New Lead: Loft Conversion",     src: "/business-4.jpg", rotate: "2deg",  top: "225px", left: "258px", zIndex: 2 },
];

export default function BusinessCTA() {
  return (
    <div style={{
      background: "#e8ecf7",
      borderRadius: "24px",
      padding: "50px 50px",
      display: "flex",
      alignItems: "center",
      justifyContent: "space-between",
      gap: "40px",
      fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
      maxWidth: "1216px",
      minHeight:"550px",
      alignItems:"center",
    }} className="mx-auto my-20">

      {/* Left */}
      <div style={{ maxWidth: "440px", flexShrink: 0 }}>
        <h2 style={{ fontSize: "42px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", lineHeight: 1.25, margin: "0 0 16px" }}>
          Grow your business with Quotemyjob.
        </h2>
        <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: "0 0 32px" }}>
          Join 1000+ verified professionals and start receiving quality leads in your immediate area today.
        </p>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px", alignItems: "flex-start" }}>
          <button style={{
            background: "#f97316", color: "#fff", border: "none",
            borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
            fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer",
            fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>
            Join as a Tradesperson
          </button>
          <button style={{
            background: "#fff", color: "#0f172a", border: "none",
            borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
            fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer",
            fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>
            Success Stories
          </button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right — lead cards */}
      <div style={{ position: "relative", width: "560px", height: "500px", flexShrink: 0 }}>
        {leads.map((lead, i) => (
          <div key={i} style={{
            position: "absolute",
            top: lead.top,
            left: lead.left,
            width: "230px",
            background: "#fff",
            borderRadius: "12px",
            overflow: "hidden",
            boxShadow: "0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)",
            transform: `rotate(${lead.rotate})`,
            zIndex: lead.zIndex,
          }}>
            <img src={lead.src} alt={lead.label}className="rounded-2xl" style={{ width: "100%", height: "160px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block", padding:"10px" }} />
            <div style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
              <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#0f172a" }}>{lead.label}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

    </div>
  );
}

make it responsive

21 May

Claude responded: Add this CSS + swap the layout to flex-wrap:

Add this CSS + swap the layout to flex-wrap:

1. Add to your global CSS / tailwind base:

css
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .business-cta { flex-direction: column !important; padding: 32px 24px !important; }
  .business-cta-right { width: 100% !important; height: 360px !important; }
  .business-cta-left { max-width: 100% !important; }
}

2. Add classNames to the divs:

jsx
// outer div
className="mx-auto my-20 business-cta"

// left div
className="business-cta-left"

// right div
className="business-cta-right"

3. On the right panel, also add:

jsx
style={{ position: "relative", width: "560px", height: "500px", flexShrink: 0, maxWidth: "100%" }}

4. Scale down cards on mobile — add to CSS:

css
@media (max-width: 768px) {
  .business-cta-right > div { width: 160px !important; }
  .business-cta-right > div img { height: 110px !important; }
}

This keeps your existing inline styles intact and only overrides at mobile breakpoint.

You said: generate complete code

generate complete code

21 May
jsx
const leads = [
  { label: "New Lead: Bath Refurbishment", src: "/business-1.jpg", rotate: "3deg",  top: "0",     left: "0",     zIndex: 1 },
  { label: "New Lead: Garden Wall Repair", src: "/business-2.jpg", rotate: "-6deg", top: "-20px", left: "255px", zIndex: 2 },
  { label: "New Lead: Smart Home Install", src: "/business-3.jpg", rotate: "-2deg", top: "240px", left: "20px",  zIndex: 1 },
  { label: "New Lead: Loft Conversion",    src: "/business-4.jpg", rotate: "2deg",  top: "225px", left: "258px", zIndex: 2 },
];

export default function BusinessCTA() {
  return (
    <>
      <style>{`
        .business-cta { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; gap: 40px; }
        .business-cta-left { max-width: 440px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .business-cta-right { position: relative; width: 560px; height: 500px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .lead-card { width: 230px; }
        .lead-card img { height: 160px; }
        @media (max-width: 1024px) {
          .business-cta { flex-direction: column; padding: 40px 32px !important; }
          .business-cta-left { max-width: 100%; }
          .business-cta-right { width: 100%; max-width: 560px; height: 420px; }
        }
        @media (max-width: 640px) {
          .business-cta-right { height: 320px; }
          .lead-card { width: 155px !important; }
          .lead-card img { height: 110px !important; }
        }
      `}</style>

      <div
        className="business-cta mx-auto my-20"
        style={{
          background: "#e8ecf7",
          borderRadius: "24px",
          padding: "50px 50px",
          fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
          maxWidth: "1216px",
          minHeight: "550px",
        }}
      >
        {/* Left */}
        <div className="business-cta-left">
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: "42px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", lineHeight: 1.25, margin: "0 0 16px" }}>
            Grow your business with Quotemyjob.
          </h2>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: "0 0 32px" }}>
            Join 1000+ verified professionals and start receiving quality leads in your immediate area today.
          </p>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px", alignItems: "flex-start" }}>
            <button style={{
              background: "#f97316", color: "#fff", border: "none",
              borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
              fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer",
              fontFamily: "inherit",
            }}>
              Join as a Tradesperson
            </button>
            <button style={{
              background: "#fff", color: "#0f172a", border: "none",
              borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
              fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer",
              fontFamily: "inherit",
            }}>
              Success Stories
            </button>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Right — lead cards */}
        <div className="business-cta-right">
          {leads.map((lead, i) => (
            <div
              key={i}
              className="lead-card"
              style={{
                position: "absolute",
                top: lead.top,
                left: lead.left,
                background: "#fff",
                borderRadius: "12px",
                overflow: "hidden",
                boxShadow: "0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)",
                transform: `rotate(${lead.rotate})`,
                zIndex: lead.zIndex,
              }}
            >
              <img
                src={lead.src}
                alt={lead.label}
                className="rounded-2xl"
                style={{ width: "100%", objectFit: "cover", display: "block", padding: "10px" }}
              />
              <div style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
                <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#0f172a" }}>{lead.label}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

You said: still some part flowing out

still some part flowing out

21 May

Claude responded: The issue is the absolutely positioned cards overflow their container.

The issue is the absolutely positioned cards overflow their container. Fix by adjusting card positions for smaller screens:

Add this to the <style> block:

css
@media (max-width: 640px) {
  .business-cta-right { height: 320px; }
  .lead-card { width: 140px !important; }
  .lead-card img { height: 100px !important; }
  .lead-card:nth-child(1) { left: 0 !important; top: 0 !important; }
  .lead-card:nth-child(2) { left: 150px !important; top: -10px !important; }
  .lead-card:nth-child(3) { left: 0 !important; top: 175px !important; }
  .lead-card:nth-child(4) { left: 152px !important; top: 168px !important; }
}

@media (max-width: 1024px) and (min-width: 641px) {
  .lead-card { width: 190px !important; }
  .lead-card img { height: 135px !important; }
  .lead-card:nth-child(1) { left: 0 !important; top: 0 !important; }
  .lead-card:nth-child(2) { left: 205px !important; top: -15px !important; }
  .lead-card:nth-child(3) { left: 10px !important; top: 210px !important; }
  .lead-card:nth-child(4) { left: 208px !important; top: 200px !important; }
}

This repositions all 4 cards at each breakpoint so they stay within the container bounds.

You said: cards vanished

cards vanished

21 May

Claude responded: The nth-child selector doesn't work reliably inside a relatively positioned div with absolute children.

The nth-child selector doesn't work reliably inside a relatively positioned div with absolute children. Use inline responsive positioning instead. Here's the complete fixed component:

jsx
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";

const leadsData = [
  { label: "New Lead: Bath Refurbishment", src: "/business-1.jpg", rotate: "3deg"  },
  { label: "New Lead: Garden Wall Repair", src: "/business-2.jpg", rotate: "-6deg" },
  { label: "New Lead: Smart Home Install", src: "/business-3.jpg", rotate: "-2deg" },
  { label: "New Lead: Loft Conversion",    src: "/business-4.jpg", rotate: "2deg"  },
];

const positions = {
  desktop: [
    { top: "0",     left: "0",     width: "230px", imgHeight: "160px" },
    { top: "-20px", left: "255px", width: "230px", imgHeight: "160px" },
    { top: "240px", left: "20px",  width: "230px", imgHeight: "160px" },
    { top: "225px", left: "258px", width: "230px", imgHeight: "160px" },
  ],
  tablet: [
    { top: "0",     left: "0",     width: "190px", imgHeight: "135px" },
    { top: "-15px", left: "205px", width: "190px", imgHeight: "135px" },
    { top: "210px", left: "10px",  width: "190px", imgHeight: "135px" },
    { top: "200px", left: "208px", width: "190px", imgHeight: "135px" },
  ],
  mobile: [
    { top: "0",     left: "0",     width: "140px", imgHeight: "100px" },
    { top: "-10px", left: "150px", width: "140px", imgHeight: "100px" },
    { top: "175px", left: "0",     width: "140px", imgHeight: "100px" },
    { top: "168px", left: "152px", width: "140px", imgHeight: "100px" },
  ],
};

const rightSize = {
  desktop: { width: "560px", height: "500px" },
  tablet:  { width: "430px", height: "420px" },
  mobile:  { width: "300px", height: "320px" },
};

function getBreakpoint(w) {
  if (w < 640) return "mobile";
  if (w < 1024) return "tablet";
  return "desktop";
}

export default function BusinessCTA() {
  const [bp, setBp] = useState(getBreakpoint(window.innerWidth));

  useEffect(() => {
    const handler = () => setBp(getBreakpoint(window.innerWidth));
    window.addEventListener("resize", handler);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("resize", handler);
  }, []);

  const pos = positions[bp];
  const size = rightSize[bp];

  return (
    <div
      className="mx-auto my-20"
      style={{
        background: "#e8ecf7",
        borderRadius: "24px",
        padding: bp === "mobile" ? "32px 24px" : "50px 50px",
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: bp === "desktop" ? "row" : "column",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "space-between",
        gap: "40px",
        fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
        maxWidth: "1216px",
        minHeight: "550px",
      }}
    >
      {/* Left */}
      <div style={{ maxWidth: bp === "desktop" ? "440px" : "100%", flexShrink: 0 }}>
        <h2 style={{ fontSize: bp === "mobile" ? "28px" : "42px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", lineHeight: 1.25, margin: "0 0 16px" }}>
          Grow your business with Quotemyjob.
        </h2>
        <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: "0 0 32px" }}>
          Join 1000+ verified professionals and start receiving quality leads in your immediate area today.
        </p>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px", alignItems: "flex-start" }}>
          <button style={{
            background: "#f97316", color: "#fff", border: "none",
            borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
            fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>Join as a Tradesperson</button>
          <button style={{
            background: "#fff", color: "#0f172a", border: "none",
            borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
            fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>Success Stories</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right */}
      <div style={{ position: "relative", width: size.width, height: size.height, flexShrink: 0 }}>
        {leadsData.map((lead, i) => (
          <div key={i} style={{
            position: "absolute",
            top: pos[i].top,
            left: pos[i].left,
            width: pos[i].width,
            background: "#fff",
            borderRadius: "12px",
            overflow: "hidden",
            boxShadow: "0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)",
            transform: `rotate(${lead.rotate})`,
            zIndex: i % 2 === 0 ? 1 : 2,
          }}>
            <img src={lead.src} alt={lead.label} style={{
              width: "100%", height: pos[i].imgHeight,
              objectFit: "cover", display: "block", padding: "10px", borderRadius: "12px",
            }} />
            <div style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
              <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#0f172a" }}>{lead.label}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

Uses a useEffect + useState to track window width and switches positions/sizes explicitly per breakpoint — no CSS selector guessing.

You said: fix

"use client";
const footerLinks = [
    {
        heading: "Marketplace",
        links: ["Browse Categories", "For Tradespeople", "Success Stories"],
    },
    {
        heading: "Resources",
        links: ["Safety & Trust", "Support Center", "Help Guides"],
    },
    {
        heading: "Company",
        links: ["Contact Info", "About Us", "Careers"],
    },
];

export default function Footer() {
    return (
        <footer style={{
            background: "#1e2a3b",
            fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
            color: "#cbd5e1",
        }}>
            {/* Main */}
            <div style={{
                maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto",
                padding: "56px 40px 48px",
                display: "grid",
                gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr",
                gap: "70px",
            }}>

                {/* Brand */}
                <div>
                    <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px", marginBottom: "16px", marginTop:"-50px" }}>
                        {/* Logo placeholder — swap with your <img> */}
                        <img src="/websiteLogoBgRem.png" style={{ width: "600px", height: "auto" }} />
                    </div>
                    <p style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#94a3b8", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: 0, maxWidth: "200px", marginTop:"-50px"  }}>
                        Connecting the best trades with the best projects since 2024.
                    </p>
                </div>

                {/* Link columns */}
                {footerLinks.map((col) => (
                    <div key={col.heading}>
                        <h4 style={{ fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#fff", margin: "0 0 20px" }}>
                            {col.heading}
                        </h4>
                        <ul style={{ listStyle: "none", margin: 0, padding: 0, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px" }}>
                            {col.links.map((link) => (
                                <li key={link}>
                                    <a href="#" style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#94a3b8", textDecoration: "none" }}
                                        onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#fff"}
                                        onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#94a3b8"}
                                    >{link}</a>
                                </li>
                            ))}
                        </ul>
                    </div>
                ))}
            </div>

            {/* Divider */}
            <div style={{ borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }} />

            {/* Bottom bar */}
            <div style={{
                maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto",
                padding: "20px 40px",
                display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between",
            }}>
                <span style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "#64748b" }}>
                    © 2024 Quotemyjob. Built for professionals.
                </span>
                <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "24px" }}>
                    {["Privacy Policy", "Terms of Service", "Cookie Settings"].map((item) => (
                        <a key={item} href="#" style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "#64748b", textDecoration: "none" }}
                            onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#fff"}
                            onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#64748b"}
                        >{item}</a>
                    ))}
                </div>
            </div>
        </footer>
    );
}

fix

21 May

Claude responded: Two changes needed:

Two changes needed:

1. Logo width is 600px — way too big. Fix:

jsx
<img src="/websiteLogoBgRem.png" style={{ width: "160px", height: "auto", mixBlendMode: "screen" }} />

2. Remove the negative marginTop hacks on both the logo div and the <p> — they were only needed because the logo was oversized:

jsx
// logo wrapper div
style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px", marginBottom: "16px" }}

// paragraph
style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#94a3b8", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: 0, maxWidth: "200px" }}

You said: but fix i mean make it responsive

but fix i mean make it responsive

21 May

Claude responded: Add this <style> block inside the <footer> tag at the top:

Add this <style> block inside the <footer> tag at the top:

jsx
<style>{`
  .footer-grid {
    display: grid;
    grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr;
    gap: 70px;
  }
  .footer-bottom {
    display: flex;
    align-items: center;
    justify-content: space-between;
  }
  @media (max-width: 1024px) {
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 40px; }
  }
  @media (max-width: 640px) {
    .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
    .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; text-align: center; }
    .footer-bottom-links { flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; }
  }
`}</style>

Then add classNames to the two divs:

jsx
// main grid div — remove inline display/grid/gap styles, add className
<div className="footer-grid" style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "56px 40px 48px" }}>

// bottom bar div — remove inline display/flex styles, add className
<div className="footer-bottom" style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "20px 40px" }}>

// the links div inside bottom bar
<div className="footer-bottom-links" style={{ display: "flex", gap: "24px" }}>

You said: give code

give code

21 May
jsx
"use client";

const footerLinks = [
  { heading: "Marketplace", links: ["Browse Categories", "For Tradespeople", "Success Stories"] },
  { heading: "Resources",   links: ["Safety & Trust", "Support Center", "Help Guides"] },
  { heading: "Company",     links: ["Contact Info", "About Us", "Careers"] },
];

export default function Footer() {
  return (
    <footer style={{ background: "#1e2a3b", fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif", color: "#cbd5e1" }}>
      <style>{`
        .footer-grid { display: grid; grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr 1fr 1fr; gap: 70px; }
        .footer-bottom { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; }
        .footer-bottom-links { display: flex; gap: 24px; }
        @media (max-width: 1024px) {
          .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr 1fr; gap: 40px; }
        }
        @media (max-width: 640px) {
          .footer-grid { grid-template-columns: 1fr; gap: 32px; }
          .footer-bottom { flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; text-align: center; }
          .footer-bottom-links { flex-wrap: wrap; justify-content: center; }
        }
      `}</style>

      {/* Main */}
      <div className="footer-grid" style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "56px 40px 48px" }}>

        {/* Brand */}
        <div>
          <div style={{ marginBottom: "16px" }}>
            <img src="/websiteLogoBgRem.png" style={{ width: "160px", height: "auto", mixBlendMode: "screen" }} />
          </div>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#94a3b8", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: 0, maxWidth: "200px" }}>
            Connecting the best trades with the best projects since 2024.
          </p>
        </div>

        {/* Link columns */}
        {footerLinks.map((col) => (
          <div key={col.heading}>
            <h4 style={{ fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#fff", margin: "0 0 20px" }}>
              {col.heading}
            </h4>
            <ul style={{ listStyle: "none", margin: 0, padding: 0, display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px" }}>
              {col.links.map((link) => (
                <li key={link}>
                  <a href="#" style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#94a3b8", textDecoration: "none" }}
                    onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#fff"}
                    onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#94a3b8"}
                  >{link}</a>
                </li>
              ))}
            </ul>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* Divider */}
      <div style={{ borderTop: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.08)" }} />

      {/* Bottom bar */}
      <div className="footer-bottom" style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "20px 40px" }}>
        <span style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "#64748b" }}>
          © 2024 Quotemyjob. Built for professionals.
        </span>
        <div className="footer-bottom-links">
          {["Privacy Policy", "Terms of Service", "Cookie Settings"].map((item) => (
            <a key={item} href="#" style={{ fontSize: "12px", color: "#64748b", textDecoration: "none" }}
              onMouseEnter={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#fff"}
              onMouseLeave={(e) => e.target.style.color = "#64748b"}
            >{item}</a>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>
    </footer>
  );
}

You said: if screen is smaller, just show them in a line

if screen is smaller, just show them in a line

21 May

Claude responded: Change the positions and rightSize for mobile, and switch to a horizontal row layout:

Change the positions and rightSize for mobile, and switch to a horizontal row layout:

Replace the mobile positions and rightSize:

js
mobile: [
  { top: "0", left: "0",     width: "120px", imgHeight: "90px" },
  { top: "0", left: "130px", width: "120px", imgHeight: "90px" },
  { top: "0", left: "260px", width: "120px", imgHeight: "90px" },
  { top: "0", left: "390px", width: "120px", imgHeight: "90px" },
],
js
mobile: { width: "100%", height: "160px" },

And remove rotate on mobile by changing the transform line:

jsx
transform: bp === "mobile" ? "none" : `rotate(${lead.rotate})`,

This lays all 4 cards in a straight horizontal line on mobile with no rotation.

You said: not working

not working prev design was working but only when i reduce screen to so small and then check

21 May

Claude responded: The bug is on this line — Window (capital W) should be window:

The bug is on this line — Window (capital W) should be window:

js
const [bp, setBp] = useState(getBreakpoint(window.innerWidth));

That crash prevents the component from rendering at all on load. Fix that and the responsive behavior should work.

You said: just work on original

just work on original remove this single line concept

21 May

Claude responded: The only real fix is useState("desktop") as the initial value + calling update() immediately inside useEffect — this avoids the Window crash and ensures correc…

jsx
"use client";
import { useEffect, useState } from "react";

const leadsData = [
  { label: "New Lead: Bath Refurbishment", src: "/business-1.jpg", rotate: "3deg"  },
  { label: "New Lead: Garden Wall Repair", src: "/business-2.jpg", rotate: "-6deg" },
  { label: "New Lead: Smart Home Install", src: "/business-3.jpg", rotate: "-2deg" },
  { label: "New Lead: Loft Conversion",    src: "/business-4.jpg", rotate: "2deg"  },
];

const positions = {
  desktop: [
    { top: "0",     left: "0",     width: "230px", imgHeight: "160px" },
    { top: "-20px", left: "255px", width: "230px", imgHeight: "160px" },
    { top: "240px", left: "20px",  width: "230px", imgHeight: "160px" },
    { top: "225px", left: "258px", width: "230px", imgHeight: "160px" },
  ],
  tablet: [
    { top: "0",     left: "0",     width: "190px", imgHeight: "135px" },
    { top: "-15px", left: "205px", width: "190px", imgHeight: "135px" },
    { top: "210px", left: "10px",  width: "190px", imgHeight: "135px" },
    { top: "200px", left: "208px", width: "190px", imgHeight: "135px" },
  ],
  mobile: [
    { top: "0",     left: "0",     width: "140px", imgHeight: "100px" },
    { top: "-10px", left: "150px", width: "140px", imgHeight: "100px" },
    { top: "175px", left: "0",     width: "140px", imgHeight: "100px" },
    { top: "168px", left: "152px", width: "140px", imgHeight: "100px" },
  ],
};

const rightSize = {
  desktop: { width: "560px", height: "500px" },
  tablet:  { width: "430px", height: "420px" },
  mobile:  { width: "300px", height: "320px" },
};

function getBreakpoint(w) {
  if (w < 640) return "mobile";
  if (w < 1024) return "tablet";
  return "desktop";
}

export default function BusinessCTA() {
  const [bp, setBp] = useState("desktop");

  useEffect(() => {
    const update = () => setBp(getBreakpoint(window.innerWidth));
    update();
    window.addEventListener("resize", update);
    return () => window.removeEventListener("resize", update);
  }, []);

  const pos = positions[bp];
  const size = rightSize[bp];

  return (
    <div
      className="mx-auto my-20"
      style={{
        background: "#e8ecf7",
        borderRadius: "24px",
        padding: bp === "mobile" ? "32px 24px" : "50px 50px",
        display: "flex",
        flexDirection: bp === "desktop" ? "row" : "column",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "space-between",
        gap: "40px",
        fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
        maxWidth: "1216px",
        minHeight: "550px",
      }}
    >
      {/* Left */}
      <div style={{ maxWidth: bp === "desktop" ? "440px" : "100%", flexShrink: 0 }}>
        <h2 style={{ fontSize: bp === "mobile" ? "28px" : "42px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", lineHeight: 1.25, margin: "0 0 16px" }}>
          Grow your business with Quotemyjob.
        </h2>
        <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: "0 0 32px" }}>
          Join 1000+ verified professionals and start receiving quality leads in your immediate area today.
        </p>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px", alignItems: "flex-start" }}>
          <button style={{
            background: "#f97316", color: "#fff", border: "none",
            borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
            fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>Join as a Tradesperson</button>
          <button style={{
            background: "#fff", color: "#0f172a", border: "none",
            borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 28px",
            fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>Success Stories</button>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Right */}
      <div style={{ position: "relative", width: size.width, height: size.height, flexShrink: 0 }}>
        {leadsData.map((lead, i) => (
          <div key={i} style={{
            position: "absolute",
            top: pos[i].top,
            left: pos[i].left,
            width: pos[i].width,
            background: "#fff",
            borderRadius: "12px",
            overflow: "hidden",
            boxShadow: "0 4px 16px rgba(0,0,0,0.10)",
            transform: `rotate(${lead.rotate})`,
            zIndex: i % 2 === 0 ? 1 : 2,
          }}>
            <img src={lead.src} alt={lead.label} style={{
              width: "100%", height: pos[i].imgHeight,
              objectFit: "cover", display: "block", padding: "10px", borderRadius: "12px",
            }} />
            <div style={{ padding: "8px 10px" }}>
              <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#0f172a" }}>{lead.label}</p>
            </div>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

The only real fix is useState("desktop") as the initial value + calling update() immediately inside useEffect — this avoids the Window crash and ensures correct bp on first render.

You said: fix

                key={index}
                href={`${link.link}`}
                className="font-[var(--font-work-sans)] text-white text-md font-bold tracking-wide hover:text-orange-400 transition-colors duration-200 whitespace-nowrap"
              >
                {link.tag}
              </a>
            ))}

fix

{links.map((link, index) => (

Full fixed line:

jsx
{links.map((link, index) => (
  
    key={link.tag}
    href={`${link.link}`}
    ...

You said: Encountered two children with the same key, [object Object].

Encountered two children with the same key, [object Object]. Keys should be unique so that components maintain their identity across updates. Non-unique keys may cause children to be duplicated and/or omitted — the behavior is unsupported and could change in a future version.

11:25

Claude responded: Share your links array — the issue is in the data, not the map.

Share your links array — the issue is in the data, not the map.

const links = [
    {tag : "Home", link : "/home"},
    {tag : "About Us", link : "/about-us"},
    {tag : "Team", link : "/team"},
    {tag : "Directory", link : "/directory"},
    {tag : "Magazine", link : "/magazine"},
    {tag : "Blog", link : "/blog"},
    {tag : "Contact Us", link : "/contact-us"},
  ];
11:25

Claude responded: Data is fine.

Data is fine. The issue is you're still passing links wrong somewhere. Use key={link.link} instead:

jsx
{links.map((link, index) => (
  
    key={link.link}
    href={link.link}
    ...
  >
    {link.tag}
  </a>
))}

11:37

Claude responded: Replace /about-hero.

jsx
export default function AboutUs() {
  return (
    <div style={{
      display: "flex",
      alignItems: "center",
      justifyContent: "space-between",
      gap: "60px",
      maxWidth: "1216px",
      margin: "0 auto",
      padding: "80px 40px",
      fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
    }}>

      {/* Left */}
      <div style={{ maxWidth: "420px", flexShrink: 0 }}>
        <p style={{ fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#f97316", letterSpacing: "2px", margin: "0 0 16px" }}>
          #BUILDINGBETTERTOGETHER
        </p>
        <h1 style={{ fontSize: "56px", fontWeight: "800", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 20px", lineHeight: 1.1 }}>
          About Us
        </h1>
        <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.75, margin: "0 0 36px" }}>
          Quotemyjob is more than just a marketplace. We are the digital backbone for modern tradespeople and the most trusted partner for homeowners.
        </p>
        <button style={{
          background: "#0f172a", color: "#fff", border: "none",
          borderRadius: "8px", padding: "14px 28px",
          fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer",
          fontFamily: "inherit",
        }}>
          Meet the Team
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Right — image with quote overlay */}
      <div style={{ position: "relative", flexShrink: 0, maxWidth: "580px", width: "100%" }}>
        <img
          src="/about-hero.jpg"
          alt="About Us"
          style={{
            width: "100%",
            borderRadius: "16px",
            objectFit: "cover",
            display: "block",
            maxHeight: "460px",
          }}
        />
        {/* Quote pill */}
        <div style={{
          position: "absolute",
          bottom: "24px",
          left: "24px",
          right: "24px",
          background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.18)",
          backdropFilter: "blur(12px)",
          borderRadius: "10px",
          padding: "14px 20px",
        }}>
          <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "13px", color: "#fff", fontStyle: "italic" }}>
            "Precision in every quote, excellence in every build."
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  );
}

Replace /about-hero.jpg with your actual image path.

export default function AboutHero() {
  return (
    <div style={{
      display: "flex",
      alignItems: "center",
      justifyContent: "space-evenly",
      gap: "120px",
      maxWidth: "100vw",
      margin: "0 0",
      padding: "80px 40px",
      fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
    }}>

      {/* Left */}
      <div style={{ maxWidth: "560px", flexShrink: 0 }}>
        <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#f97316", letterSpacing: "1.4px", margin: "0 0 16px" }}>
          #BUILDINGBETTERTOGETHER
        </p>
        <h1 style={{ fontSize: "72px", fontWeight: "800", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 20px", lineHeight: 1.1 }}>
          About Us
        </h1>
        <p style={{ fontSize: "20px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.75, margin: "0 0 36px", width:"100%" }}>
          Quotemyjob is more than just a marketplace. We are the digital backbone for modern tradespeople and the most trusted partner for homeowners.
        </p>
        <button style={{
          background: "#0f172a", color: "#fff", border: "none",
          borderRadius: "8px", padding: "14px 28px",
          fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer",
          fontFamily: "inherit",
        }}>
          Meet the Team
        </button>
      </div>

      {/* Right — image with quote overlay */}
      <div style={{ position: "relative", flexShrink: 0, maxWidth: "580px", width: "100%", transform: `rotate(1deg)`, }}>
        <img
          src="/about-hero.png"
          alt="About Us"
          style={{
            width: "100%",
            borderRadius: "16px",
            objectFit: "cover",
            display: "block",
            maxHeight: "460px",
          }}
        />
        {/* Quote pill */}
        <div style={{
          position: "absolute",
          bottom: "24px",
          left: "24px",
          right: "24px",
          background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.18)",
          backdropFilter: "blur(12px)",
          borderRadius: "10px",
          padding: "14px 20px",
        }}>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#fff", fontStyle: "sans-serif" }}>
            "Precision in every quote, excellence in every build."
          </p>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  );
}

11:52

Claude responded: Add a <style> block and classNames:

Add a <style> block and classNames:

jsx
export default function AboutHero() {
  return (
    <>
      <style>{`
        .about-wrapper {
          display: flex;
          align-items: center;
          justify-content: space-evenly;
          gap: 120px;
          max-width: 100vw;
          padding: 80px 40px;
          font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif;
        }
        .about-left { max-width: 560px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .about-left h1 { font-size: 72px; }
        .about-left p.desc { font-size: 20px; }
        .about-right { position: relative; flex-shrink: 0; max-width: 580px; width: 100%; transform: rotate(1deg); }

        @media (min-width: 1600px) {
          .about-wrapper { gap: 160px; padding: 100px 80px; }
          .about-left { max-width: 640px; }
          .about-left h1 { font-size: 88px; }
          .about-left p.desc { font-size: 22px; }
          .about-right { max-width: 680px; }
        }
        @media (max-width: 1024px) {
          .about-wrapper { gap: 60px; padding: 60px 32px; }
          .about-left h1 { font-size: 56px; }
          .about-left p.desc { font-size: 17px; }
        }
        @media (max-width: 768px) {
          .about-wrapper { flex-direction: column; gap: 40px; padding: 48px 24px; }
          .about-left { max-width: 100%; }
          .about-left h1 { font-size: 44px; }
          .about-left p.desc { font-size: 16px; }
          .about-right { max-width: 100%; transform: none; }
        }
        @media (max-width: 480px) {
          .about-left h1 { font-size: 36px; }
          .about-left p.desc { font-size: 15px; }
          .about-wrapper { padding: 36px 16px; }
        }
      `}</style>

      <div className="about-wrapper">
        {/* Left */}
        <div className="about-left">
          <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#f97316", letterSpacing: "1.4px", margin: "0 0 16px" }}>
            #BUILDINGBETTERTOGETHER
          </p>
          <h1 style={{ fontWeight: "800", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 20px", lineHeight: 1.1 }}>
            About Us
          </h1>
          <p className="desc" style={{ color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.75, margin: "0 0 36px", width: "100%" }}>
            Quotemyjob is more than just a marketplace. We are the digital backbone for modern tradespeople and the most trusted partner for homeowners.
          </p>
          <button style={{
            background: "#0f172a", color: "#fff", border: "none",
            borderRadius: "8px", padding: "14px 28px",
            fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer",
            fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>
            Meet the Team
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Right */}
        <div className="about-right">
          <img
            src="/about-hero.png"
            alt="About Us"
            style={{ width: "100%", borderRadius: "16px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block", maxHeight: "460px" }}
          />
          <div style={{
            position: "absolute", bottom: "24px", left: "24px", right: "24px",
            background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.18)", backdropFilter: "blur(12px)",
            borderRadius: "10px", padding: "14px 20px",
          }}>
            <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "13px", color: "#fff", fontStyle: "italic" }}>
              "Precision in every quote, excellence in every build."
            </p>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>
    </>
  );
}

Only font sizes, gap, padding, and flex-direction change across breakpoints — all desktop styles preserved.

11:55

Claude responded: Replace /td-1.

jsx
import { ShieldCheck, BookOpen } from "lucide-react";

export default function TradeDirectory() {
  return (
    <>
      <style>{`
        .td-wrapper { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 80px; max-width: 1216px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }
        .td-images { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .td-col1 { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; }
        .td-col2 { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; padding-top: 0; }
        @media (max-width: 1024px) { .td-wrapper { gap: 48px; padding: 60px 32px; } }
        @media (max-width: 768px) { .td-wrapper { flex-direction: column; padding: 48px 24px; } .td-images { width: 100%; } }
      `}</style>

      <div className="td-wrapper">

        {/* Left — images */}
        <div className="td-images">
          {/* Col 1 — two stacked images, vertically centered */}
          <div className="td-col1">
            <img src="/td-1.jpg" alt="Tools" style={{ width: "210px", height: "210px", borderRadius: "16px", objectFit: "cover" }} />
            <img src="/td-3.jpg" alt="Worker" style={{ width: "210px", height: "210px", borderRadius: "16px", objectFit: "cover" }} />
          </div>
          {/* Col 2 — single taller image, offset upward */}
          <div className="td-col2" style={{ marginTop: "-48px" }}>
            <img src="/td-2.jpg" alt="Planning" style={{ width: "210px", height: "290px", borderRadius: "16px", objectFit: "cover" }} />
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Right — text */}
        <div style={{ maxWidth: "480px" }}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: "36px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", lineHeight: 1.25, margin: "0 0 20px" }}>
            The Trade Directory & Digital Magazine
          </h2>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.75, margin: "0 0 36px" }}>
            We bridge the gap between technical expertise and editorial inspiration. Quotemyjob serves as both a high-authority trade directory and a cutting-edge digital magazine for industry professionals.
          </p>

          {/* Feature items */}
          {[
            {
              icon: <ShieldCheck size={20} color="#f97316" />,
              title: "Verified Professionals",
              desc: "Every trade member is strictly vetted for quality and standards.",
            },
            {
              icon: <BookOpen size={20} color="#f97316" />,
              title: "Digital Authority",
              desc: "Our magazine covers the latest in construction tech, design trends, and business growth.",
            },
          ].map((item) => (
            <div key={item.title} style={{ display: "flex", gap: "16px", marginBottom: "28px" }}>
              <div style={{
                width: "44px", height: "44px", borderRadius: "10px",
                background: "#fff3e8", display: "flex", alignItems: "center",
                justifyContent: "center", flexShrink: 0,
              }}>
                {item.icon}
              </div>
              <div>
                <p style={{ margin: "0 0 4px", fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a" }}>{item.title}</p>
                <p style={{ margin: 0, fontSize: "14px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.65 }}>{item.desc}</p>
              </div>
            </div>
          ))}
        </div>

      </div>
    </>
  );
}

Replace /td-1.jpg, /td-2.jpg, /td-3.jpg with your actual image paths. The second column is offset upward with marginTop: "-48px" to match the staggered layout in the design.

You said: bring complete content of div in the center

<div className=" w-full bg-[#F0F3FF]">
                <div className="td-wrapper ">

                    {/* Left — images */}

bring complete content of div in the center

Claude responded: Add mx-auto to the inner div:

Add mx-auto to the inner div:

jsx
<div className="w-full bg-[#F0F3FF]">
  <div className="td-wrapper mx-auto">

You said: not wokring

12:06

Claude responded: Add margin: "0 auto" via style since the CSS class might not be applying:

Add margin: "0 auto" via style since the CSS class might not be applying:

jsx
<div className="w-full bg-[#F0F3FF]">
  <div className="td-wrapper" style={{ margin: "0 auto" }}>

You said: still same

still same

12:06

Claude responded: Check what's in your .

Check what's in your .td-wrapper CSS — it likely has max-width: 100% or no max-width at all, which makes margin: auto have no effect. Fix:

css
.td-wrapper { 
  display: flex; 
  align-items: center; 
  gap: 80px; 
  max-width: 1216px;   /* this is what makes margin auto work */
  margin: 0 auto; 
  padding: 80px 40px; 
  font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; 
}

Make sure max-width: 1216px is there — without it margin: 0 auto does nothing.

<style>{`
        .td-wrapper { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 100px; max-width: 100vw; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }
        .td-images { display: flex; gap: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }
        .td-col1 { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: center; gap: 16px; }
        .td-col2 { display: flex; flex-direction: column; justify-content: flex-start; padding-top: 0; }
        @media (max-width: 1024px) { .td-wrapper { gap: 48px; padding: 60px 32px; } }
        @media (max-width: 768px) { .td-wrapper { flex-direction: column; padding: 48px 24px; } .td-images { width: 100%; } }
      `}</style>
12:06

Claude responded: Change max-width: 100vw to max-width: 1216px:

Change max-width: 100vw to max-width: 1216px:

css
.td-wrapper { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 100px; max-width: 1216px; margin: 0 auto; padding: 80px 40px; font-family: 'DM Sans', sans-serif; }

That's the only change needed.

12:10
jsx
import { MapPin, Gauge, MonitorSmartphone } from "lucide-react";

const features = [
  {
    icon: <MapPin size={20} color="#f97316" />,
    title: "40-Mile Radius",
    desc: "Post a job and our intelligent system instantly notifies all qualified tradespeople within a 40-mile radius, ensuring local expertise.",
    dark: false,
  },
  {
    icon: <Gauge size={20} color="#f97316" />,
    title: "Rapid Quoting",
    desc: "No more waiting weeks for a reply. Our streamlined platform encourages faster professional responses and detailed, transparent quotes.",
    dark: true,
  },
  {
    icon: <MonitorSmartphone size={20} color="#f97316" />,
    title: "Device Agnostic",
    desc: "Access your dashboard, message trades, or read our latest magazine issues seamlessly on your phone, tablet, or desktop.",
    dark: false,
  },
];

export default function Advantage() {
  return (
    <div style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "80px 40px", fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif" }}>

      {/* Header */}
      <div style={{ textAlign: "center", marginBottom: "60px" }}>
        <h2 style={{ fontSize: "40px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 12px" }}>
          The Quotemyjob Advantage
        </h2>
        <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#64748b", margin: 0 }}>
          Innovative features designed to streamline the project lifecycle for both sides.
        </p>
      </div>

      {/* Cards */}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr 1fr", gap: "24px", alignItems: "center" }}>
        {features.map((f) => (
          <div key={f.title} style={{
            background: f.dark ? "#0f172a" : "#fff",
            borderRadius: "16px",
            padding: f.dark ? "48px 36px" : "36px 28px",
            boxShadow: f.dark ? "0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)" : "0 2px 12px rgba(0,0,0,0.06)",
            transform: f.dark ? "scale(1.05)" : "scale(1)",
          }}>
            <div style={{
              width: "48px", height: "48px", borderRadius: "12px",
              background: f.dark ? "rgba(255,255,255,0.1)" : "#fff3e8",
              display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
              marginBottom: "28px",
            }}>
              {f.icon}
            </div>
            <h3 style={{ fontSize: "20px", fontWeight: "700", color: f.dark ? "#fff" : "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 14px" }}>
              {f.title}
            </h3>
            <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", color: f.dark ? "#94a3b8" : "#475569", lineHeight: 1.75, margin: 0 }}>
              {f.desc}
            </p>
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

    </div>
  );
}

12:17

Claude responded: Replace /mag-cover.

jsx
import { HelpCircle, Mail, Phone } from "lucide-react";

export default function MagazineCTA() {
  return (
    <div style={{
      background: "#0f172a",
      padding: "72px 40px",
      fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
    }}>
      <div style={{
        maxWidth: "1216px",
        margin: "0 auto",
        display: "flex",
        alignItems: "center",
        justifyContent: "space-between",
        gap: "60px",
      }}>

        {/* Left */}
        <div style={{ maxWidth: "440px", flexShrink: 0 }}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: "32px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#fff", margin: "0 0 16px", lineHeight: 1.3 }}>
            Stay Ahead with our Digital Magazine
          </h2>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", color: "#94a3b8", lineHeight: 1.75, margin: "0 0 32px" }}>
            Exclusive interviews with industry leaders, tool reviews, and deep dives into upcoming building regulations. Available to all members for free.
          </p>

          {/* Contact card */}
          <div style={{
            background: "rgba(255,255,255,0.06)",
            border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.1)",
            borderRadius: "14px",
            padding: "24px 28px",
          }}>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px", marginBottom: "16px" }}>
              <HelpCircle size={18} color="#f97316" />
              <span style={{ fontSize: "14px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#fff" }}>Get in Touch</span>
            </div>
            <div style={{ display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "10px" }}>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "10px" }}>
                <Mail size={14} color="#94a3b8" />
                <span style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#94a3b8" }}>hello@quotemyjob.com</span>
              </div>
              <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "10px" }}>
                <Phone size={14} color="#94a3b8" />
                <span style={{ fontSize: "13px", color: "#94a3b8" }}>+44 (0) 800 123 4567</span>
              </div>
            </div>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Right — magazine images */}
        <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "flex-end", gap: "16px", flexShrink: 0 }}>
          <img
            src="/mag-cover.jpg"
            alt="Magazine Cover"
            style={{
              width: "220px",
              height: "300px",
              objectFit: "cover",
              borderRadius: "12px",
              boxShadow: "0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
            }}
          />
          <img
            src="/mag-back.jpg"
            alt="Magazine Back"
            style={{
              width: "180px",
              height: "240px",
              objectFit: "cover",
              borderRadius: "12px",
              boxShadow: "0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)",
              marginBottom: "20px",
            }}
          />
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

Replace /mag-cover.jpg and /mag-back.jpg with your actual image paths.

You said: i wanna zoom in the image

i wanna zoom in the image

12:23

Claude responded: Add overflow: "hidden" to the image wrapper and a hover scale on the <img>:

Add overflow: "hidden" to the image wrapper and a hover scale on the <img>:

jsx
// wrap each img in a div
<div style={{ borderRadius: "12px", overflow: "hidden", boxShadow: "0 8px 32px rgba(0,0,0,0.3)" }}>
  <img
    src="/mag-cover.jpg"
    alt="Magazine Cover"
    style={{
      width: "220px", height: "300px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block",
      transition: "transform 0.4s ease",
    }}
    onMouseEnter={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.transform = "scale(1.08)"}
    onMouseLeave={(e) => e.currentTarget.style.transform = "scale(1)"}
  />
</div>

Do the same for the second image. Move boxShadow to the wrapper div and remove it from the <img>.

You said: fix

<img
                            src="/mag-cover.png"
                            alt="Magazine Cover"
                            style={{
                                width: "220px", height: "300px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block",
                                transform: "scale(1.72),rotate(-3deg)"
                            }}
                        />

fix

12:30

Claude responded: Separate values need to be space-separated, not comma-separated:

Separate values need to be space-separated, not comma-separated:

jsx
transform: "scale(1.72) rotate(-3deg)"

12:34
jsx
import { UserSearch, UserCog } from "lucide-react";

export default function ReadyToBuild() {
  return (
    <div style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "80px 40px", fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif" }}>

      <h2 style={{ fontSize: "48px", fontWeight: "800", color: "#0f172a", textAlign: "center", margin: "0 0 48px" }}>
        Ready to Build Something Great?
      </h2>

      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1fr", gap: "24px" }}>

        {/* Card 1 — Customer */}
        <div style={{
          background: "#f97316", borderRadius: "16px", padding: "36px 32px",
          display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px",
        }}>
          <UserSearch size={32} color="#fff" />
          <h3 style={{ fontSize: "20px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#fff", margin: 0 }}>I'm a Customer</h3>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.85)", lineHeight: 1.65, margin: 0 }}>
            Post your project and find the right tradesperson today.
          </p>
          <button style={{
            display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px",
            background: "none", border: "none", color: "#fff",
            fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "700", letterSpacing: "1px",
            cursor: "pointer", padding: 0, marginTop: "8px", fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>
            POST A JOB →
          </button>
        </div>

        {/* Card 2 — Tradesperson */}
        <div style={{
          background: "#fff", borderRadius: "16px", padding: "36px 32px",
          display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", gap: "12px",
          boxShadow: "0px 32px 64px -12px #0D1C3214",
        }}>
          <UserCog size={32} color="#f97316" />
          <h3 style={{ fontSize: "20px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", margin: 0 }}>I'm a Tradesperson</h3>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.65, margin: 0 }}>
            Grow your business and gain access to local high-quality leads.
          </p>
          <button style={{
            display: "flex", alignItems: "center", gap: "8px",
            background: "none", border: "none", color: "#f97316",
            fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "700", letterSpacing: "1px",
            cursor: "pointer", padding: 0, marginTop: "8px", fontFamily: "inherit",
          }}>
            JOIN THE NETWORK →
          </button>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

Claude responded: Share your navbar code and how you're tracking the current route (Next.

Share your navbar code and how you're tracking the current route (Next.js usePathname, React Router useLocation, etc.) and I'll give you the exact change.

"use client";
import { useState } from "react";

const NavBar = () => {
  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  

  const links = [
    {tag : "Home", link : "/home"},
    {tag : "About Us", link : "/about-us"},
    {tag : "Team", link : "/team"},
    {tag : "Directory", link : "/directory"},
    {tag : "Magazine", link : "/magazine"},
    {tag : "Blog", link : "/blog"},
    {tag : "Contact Us", link : "/contact-us"},
  ];

  return (
12:46

Claude responded: Add usePathname from Next.

Add usePathname from Next.js:

jsx
"use client";
import { useState } from "react";
import { usePathname } from "next/navigation";

const NavBar = () => {
  const [menuOpen, setMenuOpen] = useState(false);
  const pathname = usePathname();

  const links = [
    { tag: "Home", link: "/home" },
    // ...
  ];

Then in your link render, add the active color check:

jsx
{links.map((link) => (
  
    key={link.link}
    href={link.link}
    className={`font-[var(--font-work-sans)] text-md font-bold tracking-wide transition-colors duration-200 whitespace-nowrap ${
      pathname === link.link ? "text-orange-400" : "text-white hover:text-orange-400"
    }`}
  >
    {link.tag}
  </a>
))}
