create this also background: radial-gradient(74.54% 145.55% at 30% 50%, #D06600 0%, rgba(208, 102, 0, 0) 50%);

12:52

Claude responded: Replace /team-hero-bg.

jsx
export default function TeamHero() {
  return (
    <div style={{
      position: "relative",
      background: "#0a0f1e",
      overflow: "hidden",
      padding: "80px 60px 100px",
      fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif",
      minHeight: "420px",
    }}>

      {/* Radial gradient overlay */}
      <div style={{
        position: "absolute", inset: 0, pointerEvents: "none",
        background: "radial-gradient(74.54% 145.55% at 30% 50%, #D06600 0%, rgba(208, 102, 0, 0) 50%)",
        opacity: 0.4,
      }} />

      {/* BG image — replace with your actual architectural grid image */}
      <img
        src="/team-hero-bg.png"
        alt=""
        style={{
          position: "absolute", top: 0, right: 0,
          height: "100%", width: "60%",
          objectFit: "cover", objectPosition: "left",
          opacity: 0.3, pointerEvents: "none",
        }}
      />

      {/* Content */}
      <div style={{ position: "relative", zIndex: 1, maxWidth: "640px" }}>

        {/* Badge */}
        <div style={{
          display: "inline-block",
          border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.25)",
          borderRadius: "6px",
          padding: "6px 14px",
          fontSize: "11px",
          fontWeight: "700",
          letterSpacing: "1.5px",
          color: "#fff",
          marginBottom: "28px",
        }}>
          EXPERTISE & AUTHORITY
        </div>

        <h1 style={{ fontSize: "64px", fontWeight: "800", lineHeight: 1.1, margin: "0 0 24px" }}>
          <span style={{ color: "#fff" }}>Meet the Team — The<br />Minds Behind the<br /></span>
          <span style={{ color: "#f97316" }}>Digital Foreman</span>
          <span style={{ color: "#fff" }}>.</span>
        </h1>

        <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "rgba(255,255,255,0.55)", lineHeight: 1.75, margin: 0, maxWidth: "420px" }}>
          Bridging the gap between architectural precision and digital innovation. We are the publishers, developers, and strategists defining the future of trade services.
        </p>

      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

Replace /team-hero-bg.png with your architectural grid image. If you don't have one, remove the <img> tag — the radial gradient alone gives a similar dark orange glow effect.

13:07
jsx
import { Mail, Link, Share2, User } from "lucide-react";

const team = [
  {
    name: "Martyn Boyd",
    role: "Partner, UB Media & Publisher of Modern Builder Magazine",
    bio: "With decades of experience in construction media, Martyn oversees the strategic direction of Blueprint Forge. His vision for Modern Builder Magazine set the standard for trade excellence that now drives our digital ecosystem.",
    img: "/team-1.jpg",
    icons: [<Mail size={16} />, <Link size={16} />],
    large: true,
  },
  {
    name: "Jasen Upritchard",
    role: "Partner, UB Media Business Development",
    bio: "Jasen drives the growth engines of the platform, fostering partnerships that connect high-tier contractors with the projects that matter most.",
    img: "/team-2.jpg",
    icons: [<Mail size={16} />, <Share2 size={16} />],
    large: false,
  },
  {
    name: "Craig Kennedy",
    role: "IT & Software Development",
    bio: "The architect of our digital infrastructure. Craig ensures the platform remains robust, secure, and intuitive for both homeowners and professionals.",
    img: "/team-3.jpg",
    icons: [<Mail size={16} />, <User size={16} />],
    large: false,
  },
];

const IconBtn = ({ children }) => (
  <div style={{
    width: "36px", height: "36px", borderRadius: "8px",
    background: "#f0f3ff", display: "flex", alignItems: "center",
    justifyContent: "center", cursor: "pointer", color: "#475569",
  }}>
    {children}
  </div>
);

export default function TeamCards() {
  return (
    <div style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "60px 40px", fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif" }}>

      {/* Row 1 */}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1.3fr 1fr", gap: "24px", marginBottom: "24px" }}>

        {/* Martyn — large card */}
        <div style={{ background: "#fff", borderRadius: "20px", padding: "32px", boxShadow: "0px 32px 64px -12px #0D1C3214" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "24px", marginBottom: "20px" }}>
            <div style={{ position: "relative", flexShrink: 0 }}>
              <img src="/team-1.jpg" alt="Martyn Boyd" style={{ width: "130px", height: "140px", borderRadius: "12px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block" }} />
              <div style={{
                position: "absolute", bottom: "-8px", right: "-8px",
                width: "28px", height: "28px", borderRadius: "50%",
                background: "#f97316", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center",
              }}>
                <svg width="14" height="14" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="white"><path d="M9 12l2 2 4-4M12 2a10 10 0 100 20A10 10 0 0012 2z" stroke="white" strokeWidth="2" fill="none" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"/></svg>
              </div>
            </div>
            <div>
              <h3 style={{ fontSize: "22px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 4px" }}>Martyn Boyd</h3>
              <p style={{ fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#f97316", margin: "0 0 16px" }}>Partner, UB Media & Publisher of Modern Builder Magazine</p>
              <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: 0 }}>
                With decades of experience in construction media, Martyn oversees the strategic direction of Blueprint Forge. His vision for Modern Builder Magazine set the standard for trade excellence that now drives our digital ecosystem.
              </p>
            </div>
          </div>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px" }}>
            <IconBtn><Mail size={16} /></IconBtn>
            <IconBtn><Link size={16} /></IconBtn>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Jasen — smaller card */}
        <div style={{ background: "#fff", borderRadius: "20px", padding: "28px", boxShadow: "0px 32px 64px -12px #0D1C3214" }}>
          <img src="/team-2.jpg" alt="Jasen Upritchard" style={{ width: "72px", height: "72px", borderRadius: "12px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block", marginBottom: "16px" }} />
          <h3 style={{ fontSize: "20px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 4px" }}>Jasen Upritchard</h3>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#f97316", margin: "0 0 14px" }}>Partner, UB Media Business Development</p>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: "0 0 20px" }}>
            Jasen drives the growth engines of the platform, fostering partnerships that connect high-tier contractors with the projects that matter most.
          </p>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px" }}>
            <IconBtn><Mail size={16} /></IconBtn>
            <IconBtn><Share2 size={16} /></IconBtn>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Row 2 */}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "1fr 1.3fr", gap: "24px" }}>

        {/* Craig — card with code icon */}
        <div style={{ background: "#fff", borderRadius: "20px", padding: "28px", boxShadow: "0px 32px 64px -12px #0D1C3214" }}>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", justifyContent: "space-between", alignItems: "flex-start", marginBottom: "16px" }}>
            <img src="/team-3.jpg" alt="Craig Kennedy" style={{ width: "72px", height: "72px", borderRadius: "12px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block" }} />
            <div style={{
              width: "52px", height: "44px", borderRadius: "10px",
              border: "1px solid #e2e8f0", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center", color: "#f97316",
            }}>
              <svg width="20" height="20" viewBox="0 0 24 24" fill="none" stroke="#f97316" strokeWidth="1.5" strokeLinecap="round" strokeLinejoin="round"><polyline points="16 18 22 12 16 6"/><polyline points="8 6 2 12 8 18"/></svg>
            </div>
          </div>
          <h3 style={{ fontSize: "20px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 4px" }}>Craig Kennedy</h3>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "13px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#f97316", margin: "0 0 14px" }}>IT & Software Development</p>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "14px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: "0 0 20px" }}>
            The architect of our digital infrastructure. Craig ensures the platform remains robust, secure, and intuitive for both homeowners and professionals.
          </p>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px" }}>
            <IconBtn><Mail size={16} /></IconBtn>
            <IconBtn><User size={16} /></IconBtn>
          </div>
        </div>

        {/* Philosophy */}
        <div style={{ background: "#f0f3ff", borderRadius: "20px", padding: "40px 36px", display: "flex", flexDirection: "column", justifyContent: "center" }}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: "36px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 20px" }}>Our Philosophy</h2>
          <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.8, margin: 0 }}>
            We believe in the power of professional visibility. By combining heritage publishing with modern software, we create a ecosystem where quality craftsmanship is celebrated and rewarded.
          </p>
        </div>

      </div>
    </div>
  );
}

<div>
  <h3 ...>Martyn Boyd</h3>
  <p ...>Partner, UB Media...</p>
  <p ...>With decades of experience...</p>
  <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px", marginTop: "16px" }}>
    <IconBtn><CiMail size={16} /></IconBtn>
    <IconBtn><MdLink size={16} /></IconBtn>
  </div>
</div>

And remove the old <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px" }}> that was outside.

You said: badge got disrupted

badge got disrupted

13:38

Claude responded: Change right: "-8px" back to right: "8px":

Change right: "-8px" back to right: "8px":

jsx
bottom: "8px", right: "8px",

You said: nope

nope

13:38

Claude responded: Share a screenshot of what it looks like now so I can see exactly what's off.

Share a screenshot of what it looks like now so I can see exactly what's off.

13:38

Claude responded: The badge is outside the image because the parent div doesn't have overflow: hidden.

The badge is outside the image because the parent div doesn't have overflow: hidden. Since you want the badge visible over the corner, keep overflow as is but fix the position:

jsx
position: "absolute", bottom: "8px", right: "8px",

And make sure the parent wrapper div has position: "relative" and no overflow: "hidden". The issue is the badge div is inheriting position from somewhere else. Check that your structure is exactly:

jsx
<div style={{ position: "relative", flexShrink: 0, display: "inline-block" }}>
  <img ... style={{ width: "130px", height: "140px", borderRadius: "12px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block" }} />
  <div style={{ position: "absolute", bottom: "8px", right: "8px", ... }}>
    <HiCheckBadge color="#D06600" />
  </div>
</div>

The display: "inline-block" on the wrapper makes it shrink to the image size so bottom/right are relative to the image edges.

You said: still same

still same

13:40

Claude responded: The badge is sitting below the image because the wrapper div is taller than the image.

The badge is sitting below the image because the wrapper div is taller than the image. The fix is to make the wrapper exactly the image size:

jsx
<div style={{ position: "relative", flexShrink: 0, width: "130px", height: "140px" }}>
  <img src="/martin.jpg" alt="Martyn Boyd" style={{ width: "130px", height: "140px", borderRadius: "12px", objectFit: "cover", display: "block" }} />
  <div style={{ position: "absolute", bottom: "8px", right: "8px", width: "28px", height: "28px", borderRadius: "7px", background: "#0D1C32", display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "center" }}>
    <HiCheckBadge color="#D06600" />
  </div>
</div>

Setting explicit width and height on the wrapper makes it exactly the image size so bottom: 8px, right: 8px lands on the image corner.

You said: create this

create this

13:57
jsx
const stats = [
  { value: "100+",    label: "MAGAZINES PUBLISHED" },
  { value: "33,000+", label: "DISTRIBUTION REACH" },
  { value: "20,000+", label: "MONTHLY PAGE VIEWS" },
  { value: "10M+",    label: "TOTAL PAGE VIEWS" },
];

export default function StatsAndCTA() {
  return (
    <div style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "60px 40px", fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif" }}>

      {/* Stats row */}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(4, 1fr)", gap: "24px", marginBottom: "48px" }}>
        {stats.map((s) => (
          <div key={s.label}>
            <h2 style={{ fontSize: "48px", fontWeight: "800", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 6px", lineHeight: 1 }}>
              {s.value}
            </h2>
            <p style={{ fontSize: "11px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#f97316", letterSpacing: "1.5px", margin: "0 0 10px" }}>
              {s.label}
            </p>
            <div style={{ width: "32px", height: "3px", background: "#f97316", borderRadius: "2px" }} />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

      {/* CTA Banner */}
      <div style={{
        background: "#0f172a",
        borderRadius: "20px",
        padding: "64px 40px",
        textAlign: "center",
        position: "relative",
        overflow: "hidden",
      }}>
        {/* Network pattern overlay */}
        <svg style={{ position: "absolute", inset: 0, width: "100%", height: "100%", opacity: 0.12 }} viewBox="0 0 900 240" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid slice">
          {[
            [80,40],[200,80],[340,30],[480,90],[600,40],[750,70],[860,50],
            [120,150],[280,130],[420,170],[560,120],[700,160],[820,140],
            [50,200],[180,210],[320,190],[460,220],[610,200],[760,210],
          ].map(([cx, cy], i) => (
            <circle key={i} cx={cx} cy={cy} r="3" fill="#f97316" />
          ))}
          {[
            [80,40,200,80],[200,80,340,30],[340,30,480,90],[480,90,600,40],
            [600,40,750,70],[750,70,860,50],[120,150,280,130],[280,130,420,170],
            [420,170,560,120],[560,120,700,160],[700,160,820,140],
            [80,40,120,150],[200,80,280,130],[340,30,420,170],[480,90,560,120],
            [600,40,700,160],[50,200,120,150],[180,210,280,130],[320,190,420,170],
            [460,220,560,120],[610,200,700,160],[760,210,820,140],
          ].map(([x1,y1,x2,y2], i) => (
            <line key={i} x1={x1} y1={y1} x2={x2} y2={y2} stroke="#6b8cba" strokeWidth="0.8" />
          ))}
        </svg>

        <div style={{ position: "relative", zIndex: 1 }}>
          <h2 style={{ fontSize: "40px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#fff", margin: "0 0 32px", lineHeight: 1.3 }}>
            Ready to join the elite<br />network of professionals?
          </h2>
          <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "16px", justifyContent: "center" }}>
            <button style={{
              background: "#f97316", color: "#fff", border: "none",
              borderRadius: "8px", padding: "14px 32px",
              fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "inherit",
            }}>Apply as a Pro</button>
            <button style={{
              background: "transparent", color: "#fff",
              border: "1px solid rgba(255,255,255,0.4)",
              borderRadius: "8px", padding: "14px 32px",
              fontSize: "15px", fontWeight: "600", cursor: "pointer", fontFamily: "inherit",
            }}>Contact Sales</button>
          </div>
        </div>
      </div>

    </div>
  );
}

Claude responded: Got it.

Got it. Just give the banner maxWidth and center it:

jsx
{/* CTA Banner */}
<div style={{
  background: "#0f172a",
  borderRadius: "20px",
  padding: "64px 40px",
  textAlign: "center",
  position: "relative",
  overflow: "hidden",
  maxWidth: "1216px",
  margin: "0 auto",
}}>
  {/* Replace SVG with your image */}
  <img src="/cta-bg.png" alt="" style={{
    position: "absolute", inset: 0, width: "100%", height: "100%",
    objectFit: "cover", opacity: 0.15, pointerEvents: "none",
  }} />
  ...
</div>

Replace /cta-bg.png with your actual background image path.

You said: width not increased

width not increased

14:02

Claude responded: The maxWidth on the outer wrapper div is limiting it.

The maxWidth on the outer wrapper div is limiting it. Either remove maxWidth from the banner's parent or make the banner break out:

jsx
{/* outer wrapper — keep max width for stats */}
<div style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "60px 40px", fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif" }}>
  {/* Stats row */}
  ...
</div>

{/* CTA Banner — full width outside the constrained wrapper */}
<div style={{ padding: "0 40px", fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif" }}>
  <div style={{
    background: "#0f172a",
    borderRadius: "20px",
    padding: "64px 40px",
    textAlign: "center",
    position: "relative",
    overflow: "hidden",
    maxWidth: "1216px",
    margin: "0 auto",
  }}>
    ...
  </div>
</div>

Move the banner outside the constrained wrapper div.

You said: create this

create this

14:52

Claude responded: Shows 10 per page (5×2 grid), arrows page through all 30.

jsx
import { useState } from "react";
import { ChevronLeft, ChevronRight } from "lucide-react";

const magazines = Array.from({ length: 30 }, (_, i) => ({
  id: i + 1,
  src: `/mag-${i + 1}.png`,
  alt: `Magazine Issue ${i + 1}`,
}));

export default function MagazinePage() {
  const [page, setPage] = useState(0);
  const perPage = 10;
  const totalPages = Math.ceil(magazines.length / perPage);
  const visible = magazines.slice(page * perPage, page * perPage + perPage);

  return (
    <div style={{ maxWidth: "1216px", margin: "0 auto", padding: "60px 40px", fontFamily: "'DM Sans', sans-serif" }}>

      {/* Hero text */}
      <p style={{ fontSize: "12px", fontWeight: "700", color: "#f97316", letterSpacing: "1.5px", margin: "0 0 8px" }}>
        MAGAZINE
      </p>
      <h1 style={{ fontSize: "56px", fontWeight: "800", color: "#0f172a", margin: "0 0 16px", lineHeight: 1.1 }}>
        <span style={{ color: "#0f172a" }}>Best </span>
        <span style={{ color: "#f97316" }}>Digital Publishing</span>
      </h1>
      <p style={{ fontSize: "15px", color: "#475569", lineHeight: 1.7, margin: "0 0 48px", maxWidth: "560px" }}>
        All back editions for the magazine are available on the carousel below, click on any image to view that edition in full.
      </p>

      {/* Section header */}
      <div style={{ display: "flex", alignItems: "center", justifyContent: "space-between", marginBottom: "20px" }}>
        <h2 style={{ fontSize: "18px", fontWeight: "600", color: "#0f172a", margin: 0 }}>Recent Editions</h2>
        <div style={{ display: "flex", gap: "8px" }}>
          {[
            { dir: -1, icon: <ChevronLeft size={16} />, disabled: page === 0 },
            { dir: 1,  icon: <ChevronRight size={16} />, disabled: page === totalPages - 1 },
          ].map(({ dir, icon, disabled }) => (
            <button
              key={dir}
              onClick={() => setPage((p) => p + dir)}
              disabled={disabled}
              style={{
                width: "34px", height: "34px",
                border: "1px solid #d1d5db", borderRadius: "6px",
                background: "#fff", display: "flex", alignItems: "center",
                justifyContent: "center", cursor: disabled ? "not-allowed" : "pointer",
                opacity: disabled ? 0.4 : 1, color: "#374151",
              }}
            >
              {icon}
            </button>
          ))}
        </div>
      </div>

      {/* Grid — 5 cols x 2 rows */}
      <div style={{ display: "grid", gridTemplateColumns: "repeat(5, 1fr)", gap: "12px" }}>
        {visible.map((mag) => (
          <div
            key={mag.id}
            style={{ borderRadius: "8px", overflow: "hidden", cursor: "pointer", transition: "transform 0.2s ease, box-shadow 0.2s ease" }}
            onMouseEnter={(e) => { e.currentTarget.style.transform = "translateY(-4px)"; e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = "0 8px 24px rgba(0,0,0,0.15)"; }}
            onMouseLeave={(e) => { e.currentTarget.style.transform = "translateY(0)"; e.currentTarget.style.boxShadow = "none"; }}
          >
            <img src={mag.src} alt={mag.alt} style={{ width: "100%", aspectRatio: "3/4", objectFit: "cover", display: "block" }} />
          </div>
        ))}
      </div>

    </div>
  );
}

Shows 10 per page (5×2 grid), arrows page through all 30. Each page click shows the next/previous 10.

jsx

  <span style={{ color: "#0f172a", letterSpacing: "-4.8px" }}>Best </span>
  <span style={{ color: "#f97316", letterSpacing: "0px", lineHeight: "100%" }}>Digital Publishing</span>
</h1>

Make sure Manrope is loaded — add to your layout.tsx or _document.tsx:

html
<link href="https://fonts.googleapis.com/css2?family=Manrope&display=swap" rel="stylesheet" />

Claude responded: The space in the color value breaks Tailwind.

The space in the color value breaks Tailwind. Use this instead:

jsx
className="border-b-3 border-[#D06600]"


Claude is AI and can make mistakes. Please double-check responses.

Content
